SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: PHYSICAL_LOCATION_CLOSE_DATE 

TYPE: DATE 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: NCDPD DataQ™ 

VALUES: MMDDYYYY (e.g., 11/28/2017), or null/missing (close date n/a)— 

COMMENT: Additional details regarding the National Council for Prescription Drug Programs (NCPDP) source data 
are available at: http://dataq.ncpdp.org/.
